person.name: Wolfric Mercia
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Biography
According to Burke's, History of the commoners, Wolfric, was the eldest son of Godwin, fourth son of Leofwine, Earl and Duke of Mercia. Wolfric was "Lord of Leek, Aldithley, and Balterley in the count of Stafford, and of Croxton, Etchells and other places in the county of Chester" and married an unnamed "daughter of William Poncius, Count of Arques and Thoulouse, son of Richard II Duke of Normandy", and thus she was "cousin to William the Conqueror"

Burkes, continues to then give them fours sons;

1.) Gamel de Tettesworth, "a thane of the king's, Lord of Aldithley, Talk and Balterley in the county of Stafford, and of Cedde and Mottram Andrew in the county of Chester, at the time of the Domesday survey". He was the ancestor of the Aldithley (later Audley), Stanley, Sneyd and Wolrich families;

2.) Walthens, Lord of Etchells, Bredbury and Brinnington in the county of Chester", ancestor of many Cheshire families, including, Barons of Stockport, and Croxton, and Venables families;

3.) Ranulphus, who also had descendants

4.) Orme de Davenport.

However almost none of this information can be confirmed by any other medieval source and according to J.H. Round, this pedigree is based on documents from the Hulton Abbey manuscripts, which are of unknown provenance and almost certainly forgeries.

One of the reasons these documents are considered suspicious is that the donations by Henry de Aldithley (Henricus de Alditelegh) to Hulton abbey, also give a detailed genealogy including "Gameli abavi sui et Wulfrici Cild atavi sui et Godwini tritavi sui et Leofwini Comitis". However as Round points out "benefactors did not recite their pedigree for the convenience of remote descendants" and in fact records such as the Domesday survey "does not prove a single link in the pedigree".

Certainly some of the people mentioned did exist, Godwin as a son of Leofwine, and Wulfric 'Cild' but most of the people mentioned in the genealogy must be considered fictional. Unfortunately though the version as presented by the Burke's publications are found throughout online genealogies.

Disambiguation
Some online genealogies attempt to equate this Wulfric with Wulfric 'Spot' who did exist and is mainly known because his will exists, but it names a daughter as his only child.

sourceList.title: A genealogical and heraldic history of the commoners of Great Britain and Ireland, enjoying territorial possessions or high official rank; but univested with heritable honours  by     Burke, John, 1787-1848

children.name: Lord Gamel Lord of Aldithley DeAuldey

zh.lifeSummary: 當Wolfric Mercia於1009年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾時，他的父親Godwine of Mercia30歲，母親Goda20歲。他於1044年與Beatrice d'Arques在英國爾從萊頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1059年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wolfric Mercia于1009年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾时，他的父亲Godwine of Mercia30岁，母亲Goda20岁。他于1044年与Beatrice d'Arques在英国爾從萊頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1059年在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mercia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Alessandro, Arcangelo, Vito.
Italian (Sicily): feminine form Meccio, which is probably a nickname from Sicilian mecciu ‘curl’, ‘ringlet’.

en.lifeSummary: When Wolfric Mercia was born in 1009, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Godwine of Mercia, was 30 and his mother, Goda, was 20. He married Beatrice d'Arques in 1044, in Congleton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1059, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wolfric Mercia est né en 1009, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Godwine of Mercia, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Goda, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice d'Arques en 1044, à Congleton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1059, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wolfric Mercia 1009 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Godwine of Mercia 30 und seine Mutter Goda 20. Er hat 1044 in Congleton, Cheshire, England Beatrice d'Arques geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1059 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wolfric Mercia è nato il nel 1009 nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Godwine of Mercia, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Goda, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice d'Arques nel 1044, nel Congleton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1059, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Wolfric Merciaが1009年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Godwine of Merciaは30歳，母Godaは20歳であった。1044年にイギリスチェシュアイアコングレトンでBeatrice d'Arquesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1059年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Wolfric Mercia(이)가 1009년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Godwine of Mercia(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Goda(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1044년 영국 체실르 콘글레턴에서 Beatrice d'Arques(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1059년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wolfric Mercia nasceu em 1009, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Godwine of Mercia, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Goda, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice d'Arques em 1044, em Congleton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1059, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wolfric Mercia родился в 1009 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Godwine of Mercia было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Goda, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice d'Arques в 1044 г. в местности конглетон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1059 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wolfric Mercia nació en 1009, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Godwine of Mercia, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Goda, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Beatrice d'Arques en 1044, en Congleton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1059, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
